scripts.pack: node node_modules/@foundryvtt/foundryvtt-cli/fvtt.mjs package pack --id naruto-d20 --type Module --compendiumName techniques --in packs/_source/techniques --out packs
scripts.pack:buffs: node node_modules/@foundryvtt/foundryvtt-cli/fvtt.mjs package pack --id naruto-d20 --type Module --compendiumName technique-buffs --in packs/_source/technique-buffs --out packs
scripts.pack:feats: node node_modules/@foundryvtt/foundryvtt-cli/fvtt.mjs package pack --id naruto-d20 --type Module --compendiumName feats --in packs/_source/feats --out packs
scripts.pack:all: npm run pack && npm run pack:buffs && npm run pack:feats
scripts.unpack: node node_modules/@foundryvtt/foundryvtt-cli/fvtt.mjs package unpack --id naruto-d20 --type Module --compendiumName techniques --in packs --out packs/_source/techniques
scripts.unpack:buffs: node node_modules/@foundryvtt/foundryvtt-cli/fvtt.mjs package unpack --id naruto-d20 --type Module --compendiumName technique-buffs --in packs --out packs/_source/technique-buffs
scripts.unpack:feats: node node_modules/@foundryvtt/foundryvtt-cli/fvtt.mjs package unpack --id naruto-d20 --type Module --compendiumName feats --in packs --out packs/_source/feats
scripts.unpack:all: npm run unpack && npm run unpack:buffs && npm run unpack:feats
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:css && npm run lint:format
scripts.lint:fix: eslint --fix scripts tools eslint.config.mjs && node node_modules/stylelint/bin/stylelint.mjs --fix "styles/**/*.css" && prettier --write "scripts/**/*.mjs" "tools/**/*.mjs" "styles/**/*.css" "lang/**/*.json"
